research_sources.title: Non-Markovian quantum processes: complete framework and efficient characterisation
research_sources.adopted_scope: multi-time history preservation and operational process representation
research_sources.claim_boundary: MemoryOS is not claimed to be a quantum process

research_sources.title: Learning Causal State Representations of Partially Observable Environments
research_sources.claim_boundary: predictive state is not latent-state truth

research_sources.title: PAC Reinforcement Learning for Predictive State Representations
research_sources.claim_boundary: no PAC or optimality claim is inherited

research_sources.title: Cognitive Architectures for Language Agents
research_sources.adopted_scope: working episodic semantic procedural memory separation
research_sources.claim_boundary: semantic memory is not fact and procedural memory is not authority

research_sources.title: MemGPT: Towards LLMs as Operating Systems
research_sources.adopted_scope: hierarchical context management and memory control separation
research_sources.claim_boundary: no unbounded context or persistence claim

research_sources.title: MemOS: An Operating System for Memory-Augmented Generation in Large Language Models
research_sources.adopted_scope: memory lifecycle governance and traceable memory resources

research_sources.title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
research_sources.adopted_scope: episodic feedback and procedural reuse candidates
research_sources.claim_boundary: stored reflection is not executable policy

research_sources.title: LEGOMem: Modular Procedural Memory for Multi-agent LLM Systems for Workflow Automation
research_sources.claim_boundary: procedural memory grants no delegation authority

research_sources.title: Zep: A Temporal Knowledge Graph Architecture for Agent Memory
research_sources.adopted_scope: temporal relation preservation and contradiction residue
research_sources.claim_boundary: temporal integration does not collapse competing claims

research_sources.title: Safe Reinforcement Learning via Shielding
research_sources.claim_boundary: shield activity is not blocker discharge

research_sources.title: Safe Reinforcement Learning via Shielding under Partial Observability
research_sources.adopted_scope: reobserve route under insufficient predictive history

research_sources.title: The Black-Box Simplex Architecture for Runtime Assurance of Autonomous CPS
research_sources.claim_boundary: MemoryOS is not an execution controller

research_sources.title: Mastering Diverse Domains through World Models
research_sources.claim_boundary: world imagination is not sourced WORLD truth or commit authority
